route_score_draft.perfect_rule: all strong axes >= 80 and weighted route score >= 75
route_score_draft.good_rule: all strong axes >= 60 and weighted route score >= 60
route_score_draft.regret_rule: weighted route score < 40 or any route-specific hard regret gate is active

score_draft.positive_effect: +10 per active positive variable, capped by axis thresholds
score_draft.negative_effect: -10 per active negative variable, capped by axis thresholds
score_draft.context_effect: context variables gate or annotate the score and do not directly add points

perfect.additional_rule: strong axis must not have unresolved critical negative variable

good.additional_rule: main facts handled, remaining cost visible
